# Data Policy configuration

[Download JSON Schema](/docs/schemas/data-policy.schema.json)

## Example

```yaml
apiVersion: libredash.dev/v1
kind: DataPolicy
metadata:
  name: example
spec:
  expression: {}
  object:
    type: workspace
  policyType: row_filter
```
